acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.collateralToken_: Collateral token used for premium transfers.

onPositionLiquidated(address,bytes32,uin.details: Claim processing is handled by LiquidationEngine through `processLiquidationClaim`.

onPositionOpened(address,bytes32,uint256.details: Coverage registration is done through `registerCoverage`; this hook only reports current status.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.realizedLoss: Loss amount used to compute payout.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.isAuthorized: True to authorize, false to revoke.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

returns._0: True when signature is valid and signer matches config.

cancelCoverageOnClose(uint256).notice: Cancels active coverage on normal close and releases reserved capacity.

getCoverage(uint256).notice: Returns insurance snapshot for a position.

onPositionClosed(address,bytes32,uint256.notice: Hook called by PositionManager when a position closes.

onPositionLiquidated(address,bytes32,uin.notice: Hook called by PositionManager when a position is liquidated.

onPositionOpened(address,bytes32,uint256.notice: Hook called by PositionManager when a position opens.

processLiquidationClaim(uint256,address,.notice: Processes liquidation claim when insured position is eligible and active.

registerCoverage(uint256,(address,bytes3.notice: Registers coverage on position open and reserves vault capacity.

setAuthorizedCaller(address,bool).notice: Sets whether an address can execute insurance lifecycle actions.

settlePremiumOnProfit(uint256,address,ui.notice: Settles premium only when close is profitable.

verifyQuote((address,bytes32,bool,uint25.notice: Verifies quote signature against configured quote signer.
